title: Ship in a bottle
description: Makes Boat items Into Ships In Bottles
body:
ship in a bottle is a texture pack that makes the boat item look less boring by makeing every boat item including bamboo rafts and chest boats into ships in bottles.

Every boat item has now got a new model that makes them look like they ar in a bottle.  

 

 

 

might make a texture pack that gives them stands in the future if requested.
